column1: # One te-form example per verb class — godan (行く), ichidan (食べる),
# and the irregulars する / 来る. Add more verb roots here to broaden the form.
# Dictionary forms live in verbs/; this deck is the conjugation paradigm.

column4: (する) te-form — do and…; please do
(来る) te-form — come and…; please come
